aiTexts: These Colorful Nylon Elastic Hair Bands are perfect for children and women alike.
Material: Made from durable nylon, ensuring gentle hold without damaging hair.
Size: Each band measures approximately 20mm in diameter, ideal for various hairstyles.
Variety: Available in packs of 100 or 200, featuring a mix of vibrant colors and classic black and white.
Usage: Great for everyday wear, special occasions, or playful styles.
Convenience: Lightweight and easy to carry, making them perfect for on-the-go styling.

3089533107.title: Silicone Telescopic Phone Finger Strap Grip Mobile Phone Hand Band Holder Finger Ring Push-Pull Grip Stand Bracket
3089533107.detail_text: Description:[Innovative Design]: Our push-pull phone case holder combines style and functionality perfectly. The wristband design provides a firm grip, while the nano-adhesive back allows for easy installation and removal without leaving any residue. [Wide Application]: The push-pull holder can be used horizontally or as a handheld holder, allowing you to enjoy hands-free entertainment. It is perfect for watching movies, live broadcasts or video calls on the go. [Easy to Carry]: The innovative ring design allows you to easily carry your phone with one hand, and it can be paired with a phone case, making it more convenient for you on the go. [Durable Material]: This product is made of high-quality plastic and is durable. It provides excellent protection from daily wear and tear, ensuring that your phone remains intact. [Easy Installation]: The phone case is designed to be easy to install. Simply stick the wristband phone holder to the phone case and enjoy the benefits of this innovative accessory. [Multi-Function]: It can not only be used as a protective case, but also as a stand and handle, making it a must-have for anyone who wants to enhance their mobile experience.Product details:Name: Push-pull support frame for mobile phone case back sticker Material: Plastic Category: Mobile phone holder Size: The total length is 14.3cm, the paste length is 9cm, the ring width is 2.9cm, and the outer package is 18.5*6*1cm Features: Wristband mobile phone holder, nano adhesive holder design, can be used for watching TV series and live broadcasts. Can be used horizontally or handheld, the ring design is more convenient and can be easily carried with mobile phone cards. Quantity: 1Package includes:1*Wristband mobile phone holder

Description:[Innovative Design]: Our push-pull phone case holder combines style and functionality perfectly. The wristband design provides a firm grip, while the nano-adhesive back allows for easy installation and removal without leaving any residue.
[Wide Application]: The push-pull holder can be used horizontally or as a handheld holder, allowing you to enjoy hands-free entertainment. It is perfect for watching movies, live broadcasts or video calls on the go.
[Easy to Carry]: The innovative ring design allows you to easily carry your phone with one hand, and it can be paired with a phone case, making it more convenient for you on the go.

Quantity: 1Package includes:1*Wristband mobile phone holder
